# 친구Base

> The verified directory for foreigners in Korea — trusted, English-friendly doctors, dentists, real estate agents, lawyers, salons and more.

친구Base ("ChinguBase") helps foreigners living in South Korea find trusted local services with verified listings, real reviews, and language-friendly filters.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured businesses, popular categories, and city coverage.
- [Browse services](/browse): Search and filter businesses by category, city, district, language, and services.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of all indexable pages.
